opts.Harm study not endorsement: Harm reduction study hai endorsement nahi hai ye
opts.Size/latency/conflicts: Size, latency aur chhupi conflicts import hoti hain
opts.Study not endorsement: Study progress hai endorsement nahi hai ye track
opts.IOUs with counterparty risk: Counterparty risk wale IOUs exchange par hote hain
opts.Guaranteed self-custody: Guaranteed self-custody — ye galat frame hai
opts.Insured forever always: Hamesha insured rehne ki guarantee — galat claim
opts.Sent to support freely: Support ko azaadi se bhejna — kabhi acceptable nahi
opts.Posted for backup help: Backup help ke liye post karna — khatarnak hai
opts.Fees plus spread/slippage effects: Fees ke sath spread aur slippage effects shamil hain
opts.Only the chart pattern: Sirf chart pattern — trading costs ignore karna
opts.Perpetual futures holders: Perpetual futures holders ko sab se zyada affect
opts.Forced close when margin fails: Jab margin fail ho to forced close hota hai
opts.Derived from risk math: Risk math se derive karna chahiye leverage ko
opts.Mint free riskless yield: Free riskless yield mint karna — ye trap hai
opts.Copy the first signal: Pehla signal copy karna — galat shuruat hai
opts.Disable stops forever: Stops hamesha ke liye band karna — galat hai
opts.Send more unlock fees: Aur unlock fees bhejna — scam trap hai ye
opts.Always diversification: Hamesha diversification — correlated bets mein nahi hota
opts.Slow grind then violent unwind: Slow grind phir violent unwind — carry fail pattern
opts.Only fails on Sundays: Sirf Sunday ko fail — ye galat assumption hai
opts.Study progress — not a license: Study progress hai license nahi hai ye track
opts.A written plan and paper-trade record: Likha hua plan aur paper-trade record hona chahiye
opts.Required by exchanges: Exchanges ke liye required — seed share ke liye nahi
opts.Your CDC / name custody: Tumhare naam pe CDC custody honi chahiye
opts.Cash under mattress only: Sirf mattress ke neeche cash — galat custody frame
opts.Price control over instant fill: Instant fill se zyada price control priority deti hai
opts.A trading cost when you cross it: Jab tum spread cross karo to trading cost hoti hai
opts.Underlying sensitivity: Underlying price move ki sensitivity measure karti hai
opts.Works against you each day: Har din tumhare khilaf kaam karti hai theta
opts.Implied volatility rises: Implied volatility (IV) barhti hai jab ye hota hai
opts.Implied volatility falls: Implied volatility (IV) girti hai jab ye hota hai
opts.Only the last trade's P&L: Sirf last trade ka P&L — poor debrief focus hai
opts.Cash is fact; profit malleable: Cash fact hai profit manipulable ho sakti hai
opts.Context/risk appetite: Context aur risk appetite set karta hai macro
opts.Keep before surplus risk: Pehle emergency keep karo phir surplus risk lo
opts.Note → size → homework: Note likho phir size phir homework — ye order hai
opts.Lagged and imperfect — not a cheat code: Lagged aur imperfect hai — cheat code nahi hai ye
opts.Zero FX risk everywhere: Har jagah zero FX risk — galat assumption hai ye
opts.Thesis + structure + max loss: Thesis structure aur max loss pehle se clear hon
opts.Core spot, tactical deriv: Core spot rakho tactical derivatives sirf tactical ke liye
opts.List non-thesis death paths: Non-thesis death paths list karo pehle se soch kar
opts.Insurance without selling: Bina bechna insurance jaisa hedge hota hai ye
opts.Fill over exact price: Exact price se zyada fill priority market order ko deti hai
opts.Noisy while overnight flow clears: Overnight flow clear hone tak open tape noisy rehti hai
opts.Professional requirement: Professional requirement nahi — reckless full size hai
opts.Complex/foreign/unusual year: Complex foreign ya unusual tax year ho to pro chahiye
opts.A guarantee you will owe zero tax: Zero tax ki guarantee dena — scam pitch hai ye
opts.Offshore secrecy that beats all law: Offshore secrecy jo sara qanoon beat kare — red flag
opts.Providing your own dated trade log: Apna dated trade log provide karna achha habit hai
opts.Filing your return automatically with FB: FBR ke sath automatically return file karna — app nahi karti
opts.True if you screenshot the certificate: Screenshot se true — ye galat belief hai ye
opts.Only if you are a celebrity: Sirf celebrity ho to — galat criterion hai ye
